title: Origins: Echo Origin
description: An origin based on Memories, and the traces of Existence they represent.
body:
An Origins Datapack featuring an origin based on Memories, and the traces of Existence they represent.

**This is coded for 1.20.1. Requires Origins, Pehkui, and Function Macro Backport**

⭐ The icon was made by the talented Chdoorwe :D

# Echo

**Existence doesn't truly end until all memories of you fade.
The connections made between individuals are, in essence, life.**

## Power List
> **Memory Trace (Primary):** You can view traces of your past. Concentrate and you can retrace this path.
> 
> **Fade (Secondary):** Temporarily fade out of reality into the realm of memories.

> **Tether:** You are bound to the world through memories. Only by making connections can you extend your life.
> 
> **Imperceptible:** Your presence is faint like a passing thought. Mobs have to be closer to notice you.
> 
> **False Memory:** Inject a false memory of your appearance to those around you. Your equipped items will not be rendered.

> **Boundary:** Neither alive nor dead. Your body is immune to effects and no longer familiar with certain concepts of death.

> **Connection Needed:** A connection is needed to see another being. Entities need to be close enough to perceive you for you to perceive them.
> 
> **Isolation:** While isolated, you start to lose your connection to the world. A being forgotten by the world will cease to be.

### Hidden Powers:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

> **Hero:** The Hero of the Village effect is automatically cleared if you aren't close enough to villagers.
> 
> **Insomnia:** You can't sleep. You can't view phantoms while in the Reality State. In the Memory State, phantoms can still see and damage you.
> 
> **Save the Pets!:** If your pets die while near you, they will become memories. Unable to be perceived by mobs, immortal, and unable to deal damage.

</details>

If you want to give any feedback or see possible updates! [Origins Server: Datapack Post](https://discord.com/channels/734127708488859831/1398507665667395708)
